title: Ore Apples
description: This mod adds in some apples based off of Minecraft ores, as well as, some random but fun apples.
body:
Welcome to the Ore Apples mod, a mod that aims to completely change the way that you view apples in Minecraft, from apples that give you fire resistance, or strength, to apples that make you explode, enchant the armor your wearing, or turn you into an undefeatable player inside of your game, you will be able to find an apple to help in almost any situation that you will find yourself in.

Apples:

Coal Apple: The Coal Apple will give you Night Vision and Fire resistance.


Enchanted Coal Apple: The Enchanted Coal Apple will give you Night Vision, Absorption, and Fire Resistance.


Iron Apple: The Iron Apple will give you Strength, Absorption, and Resistance.


Enchanted Iron Apple: The Enchanted Iron Apple will give you Strength, Absorption, Resistance, and Fire Resistance.


Diamond Apple: The Diamond Apple will give you Strength, Absorption, Resistance, Water Breathing, speed, and Fire Resistance.


Enchanted Diamond Apple: The Enchanted Diamond Apple grants more powerful versions of the Diamond Apples Buffs.


Emerald Apple: The Emerald Apple will give you Luck, Speed, Haste, and Hero of the Village.


Enchanted Emerald Apple: The Enchanted Emerald Apple will give you Luck, Speed, Haste, Jump Boost, and Hero of the Village.


Redstone Apple: The Redstone Apple will strike you with lightning before effecting you with Strength, Resistance, and Fire Resistance.


Enchanted Redstone Apple: The Enchanted Redstone Apple will cause an explosion as well as multiple lighting bolts all while giving the player resistance to help them to survive.


Lapis Apple: The Lapis Apple will provide some enchantments to the armor you are currently wearing.


Enchanted Lapis Apple: The Enchanted Lapis Apple will provide more powerful enchants to any armor that you are wearing.


Netherite Apple: The Netherite Apple will give you, Strength, Fire Resistance, Absorption, Water Breathing, Jump Boost, Speed, Regeneration, Haste and Instant Health.


TNT Apple: The TNT Apple will cause any player that eats it to explode, as well as gain Resistance to help their character survive the explosion.


Obsidian Apple: The Obsidian Apple will give you Absorption, Strength, Fire Resistance, Regeneration, Water Breathing and Resistance.


Apple of the Gods: The Apple of the Gods will give the player such powerful effects that it will be impossible for them to have their character die, as well as so much strength they can defeat the Warden in four punches.


Bunny Apple: The Bunny Apple will give you jump boost for a few minutes.


Super Bunny Apple: The Super Bunny Apple will allow you to take one huge jump, while providing enough resistance for your character to survive the fall.

For crafting recipes it's suggested you use a mod like JEI which shows the crafting recipes of every item.
